featured.title: Layout Sketch Zero
featured.summary: A closed Robot in 3 Days run with a single team, used to prove out the build schedule, tooling list, and workshop format that Layout Sketch 1 is based on.
outcomes: Full competition robot completed inside 72 hours
Tooling and components list validated against real build demand
Workshop timing tested against the build schedule
